title: Traditional small sort bagging process requires operator-managed full-bag handling

title: Belted ACB full-destination handling drops bin to takeaway conveyor and bag station

title: Exchange staging and tote replacement flow in a zone
summary: The slide describes how staging for a tote exchange occurs when a tote is imminently full or completely full. The AGV left without a tote becomes the next vehicle assigned to pick up a full tote in that zone.
